Name: AHB2WB.HADDR
Description: Carries the 32-bit address from the AHB master; the address is registered (rHADDR) and forwarded to the Wishbone side as wb_adr_o.

Name: AHB2WB.HWDATA
Description: Carries 32-bit write data from the AHB master; directly forwarded to the Wishbone bus as wb_dat_o during write operations.

Name: AHB2WB.HWRITE
Description: Indicates whether the current transaction is a write or read; registered and used to derive master_wants_write/read, which in turn drive Wishbone control (wb_we_o, wb_stb_o, wb_cyc_o).

Name: AHB2WB.HSEL
Description: Selects this bridge as the active AHB slave; registered (rHSEL) and used to qualify transaction intent (master_wants_read/write).

Name: AHB2WB.wb_we_o
Description: Indicates a write cycle to the Wishbone slave; asserted when the AHB side intends a write.

Name: AHB2WB.HREADY
Description: Indicates that the AHB bus is ready; used to qualify when AHB inputs are captured into internal registers.

Name: AHB2WB.wb_ack_i
Description: Acknowledges completion on the Wishbone side; combined with internal cycle state to generate HREADYOUT for the AHB master.

Name: AHB2WB.HRDATA
Description: Outputs 32-bit read data to the AHB master; directly driven from wb_dat_i when the transaction completes.

Name: AHB2WB.HREADYOUT
Description: Indicates to the AHB master that the slave is ready to complete the transfer; driven high based on Wishbone acknowledgment and internal cycle state.
